event: presented two enteroatmospheric fistulas (EAFs) on abdomen
placement of three open drain systems
no symptoms or signs of intestinal obstruction
protection of surrounding tissue from enteric effluent
inserted rubber drains into intestinal lumens
fistula output returned to >1000 mL/d with EN
stent expulsion due to sharp angles
implanted two vascular grafts on POD 32
anastomoses between intestinal openings and vascular grafts
discharged on POD 16 after graft implantation
VAC dressing management at outpatient department
underwent EAF resection two months after discharge
involved distal jejunum and sigmoid colon
high-output EAF unresponsive to conventional treatments
anastomosed vascular grafts showed acceptable patency
